# Risk Management System

## Risk Identification
Credit scoring model may produce biased outcomes for protected demographic groups.

## Risk Estimation
False positive rate tolerance: 5%. False negative rate tolerance: 3%.

## Risk Evaluation
Monthly bias audits across age, gender, and ethnicity.

## Risk Mitigation
Deployment blocked if bias exceeds threshold. Human review for borderline cases.

## Residual Risk
Accepted residual risk of model drift between evaluation cycles.
